title: WorkSession
description:
An on-disk work session linking worktrees, agent invocations, and gate runs.

This is distinct from [`GateEvalContext`](crate::session::GateEvalContext), which is
an in-memory crash-recoverable context for gate evaluation. `WorkSession` is the
persistent record of an entire spec evaluation lifecycle.

# Schema policy

Unknown JSON fields are intentionally tolerated (no `deny_unknown_fields`) to allow
forward-compatible schema evolution. Phases 41/42 may add fields without breaking
sessions persisted by earlier versions. Contrast with [`GateRunRecord`] which uses
strict validation for its immutable-after-creation semantics.

assay_version.description: Version of assay that created this session.

auto_promoted.description: Whether the pipeline auto-promoted the spec on a clean run.

gate_runs.description:
IDs of gate runs associated with this session.

Each entry is a `GateRunRecord.run_id` in format `<timestamp>-<6-char-hex>`
(e.g., `20260304T223015Z-a3f1b2`). Entries are deduplicated on insertion.

id.description: Unique session identifier (ULID stored as string).

phase.description: Current phase of the session lifecycle.

promoted_to.description: The status the spec was promoted to, if auto-promotion fired.

spec_name.description: Name of the spec this session is for.

tool_call_summary.description:
Summary of tool calls during the agent session.
Populated from the agent event log on session completion.
Defaults to zeros for non-streaming agents.

worktree_path.description: Path to the worktree associated with this session.

AgentInvocation.description: Details about the agent invocation for this session.

command.description: The command used to invoke the agent.

model.description: The model used by the agent, if known.

PhaseTransition.description: A recorded phase transition within a work session.

SessionPhase.description:
Phase of a work session lifecycle.

Sessions follow a linear pipeline: Created → AgentRunning → GateEvaluated → Completed.
Any phase can transition to Abandoned (the escape hatch).

SpecStatus.description: Status of a feature spec or individual requirement through its lifecycle.

oneOf.description: Initial authoring state; not yet ready for review.
Submitted for review but not yet approved.
No longer active; superseded or removed.

ToolCallSummary.description: Summary of tool calls during an agent session.

by_tool.description: Tool call counts by tool name (e.g. {"bash": 5, "edit": 3}).

error_count.description: Number of tool calls that resulted in an error.

total.description: Total number of tool calls made by the agent.
